positive: A retro 8-bit inspired illustration of a stylized sports car driving across a grid landscape under a glowing sunset. Incorporate vaporwave aesthetics, palm tree silhouettes, gradient meshes, and a strong sense of 1980s nostalgia. Synthwave, pixel art, VHS glitch effect.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, natural elements, hyperrealism, watercolor
